name: Nino Maze LOFI
short_description: First maze game that combines lo-fi songs and cute graphics.
detailed_description:
ALSO RECOMMENDED FOR YOU:





About the Game

Nino lost his way home while exploring a maze, now he must follow the food trail to return to his home.
Maze game, where you control a cat that must follow the food trail to find his way back home.
Minimalist graphics.
Made for computer.

supported_languages:
English, Portuguese - Brazil*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Bulgarian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Danish, Spanish - Latin America, Finnish, Greek, Dutch, Hungarian, Japanese, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian, Swedish, Thai, Czech, Turkish, Ukrainian, Vietnamese, Arabic
*languages with full audio support
